title: Case prep
description: Starter canvas for preparing a case file. Lanes track procedural posture, factual elements, applicable law, and witness/exhibit lists.

lanes.title: Facts
lanes.description: Stipulated facts + disputed facts; link to client interview atoms.

lanes.title: Applicable law
lanes.description: Statutes, regulations, controlling cases. Cite Bluebook.

lanes.title: Elements / claims
lanes.description: Per cause of action: prima facie elements + evidentiary support.

lanes.title: Procedural posture
lanes.description: Filing deadlines, pending motions, discovery cutoff, trial date.

lanes.title: Witnesses + exhibits
lanes.description: Witness list, exhibit pre-marks, foundation requirements.

starter_stickies.text: Filing deadline: TBD — replace with actual date
